features: Chemicals Free: No Parabens, No Sulphate, No Silicones, No Petrolatum, No Mineral Oil. This gummy wax perfect for all hair types.

Nourishes and Protects: Achieve salon-quality results with argan oil-infused hair wax that hydrates and protects, making it a must-have for hair wax womens needs. The argan oil for hair formula ensures safe, everyday use with natural ingredients.
Long-Lasting Hold: This hair styling wax provides a strong, 24-hour hold for all-day styling.
Residue-Free & Watermelon Scent: Enjoy a lightweight formula that leaves no residue or buildup, while giving you the refreshing watermelon scent with hair styling wax.

Versatile Use: Perfect for taming flyaways or creating elaborate hairstyles with this gummy wax. This hair wax can also be used to deliver outstanding hold as an edge control gel for afro hair or as a braiding gel.
description: Product description Allored Professional Argan Oil Hair and Edge Wax Achieve sleek, flawless styles with Allored Professional Argan Oil Hair and Edge Wax. Infused with nourishing argan oil, this versatile styling wax delivers 24-hour hold while keeping hair hydrated and healthy. Perfect for taming flyaways, defining edges, or creating polished looks, it works effortlessly on all hair types, making it a reliable choice for both men and women. Key Features: Nourishing Formula: Enriched with argan oil to hydrate and protect hair during styling. Long-Lasting Hold: Provides a firm, 24-hour hold for all-day confidence and polished looks. Residue-Free Finish: Lightweight and flake-free for a smooth, natural appearance. Versatile Use: Ideal for sleek styles, edge control, braiding, and taming flyaways. Suitable for All Hair Types: Designed for straight, curly, textured, and afro hair. Whether you’re styling sharp looks or managing natural curls, Allored Professional Argan Oil Hair and Edge Wax offers exceptional performance and flexibility. The 150ml jar is packed with powerful ingredients, making it an excellent choice for everyday use. Upgrade your styling routine with this must-have hair wax that combines hydration, strength, and all-day hold. Directions For Hairstyling: Take an ample amount and rub evenly between your hands until the wax softens up, then apply onto wet or dry hair and style as desired. Repeat until you've achieved your finished look. For Edges: Apply an appropriate amount of wax to edges, use fingertips or edge brush to style and finish with desired look and hold.
